project.name: Abode
project.description: A property showcase Progressive Web App targeting diaspora buyers. Admin-managed listings (single owner), WhatsApp as the primary conversion channel, with no buyer accounts required. Goal: trustworthy direct connection between buyers and landlords — no agent friction.
target_audience: West African diaspora in UK, US, EU
Property seekers from Nigeria and Ghana

frontend.styling: CSS Modules or plain CSS with design tokens
frontend.notes: No UI component library — all components hand-built per the design system

backend.media_primary: Cloudinary (image optimization, video thumbnail generation, responsive transforms)
backend.notes: Supabase handles all auth, database, and RLS. Cloudinary handles all media delivery.

whatsapp.notes: No WhatsApp API required. Deeplinks carry pre-filled message context.

maps.usage: Static embed per property detail page — no complex integration

environment_variables.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: public anon key from Supabase dashboard
environment_variables.VITE_CLOUDINARY_UPLOAD_PRESET: unsigned upload preset for admin use
environment_variables.VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY: optional — for map embeds on detail page

components.ui: Badge, Button, Chip, StatusDot, Spinner — atomic reusable

lib.cloudinary.js: Upload helper and transform URL builder

src.store: Zustand store — currency preference, saved properties (localStorage)

design_system.name: Abode Design Language
design_system.aesthetic: Editorial warmth — architectural photography meets West African material culture
anti_patterns: No Inter, Roboto, or system-ui fonts
No heavy card shadows (use borders instead)

shadows.card: none — use border: 1px solid var(--color-border) instead

database.rls_policy: Public can SELECT (read). Only authenticated admin can INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE.

columns.title: text NOT NULL
columns.slug: text UNIQUE NOT NULL — generated from title + city
columns.price_ngn: bigint — store in Naira kobo or full Naira as agreed
columns.cover_image_url: text — Cloudinary URL of primary image

properties.rls: SELECT: public. INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE: authenticated admin only.

columns.property_id: uuid REFERENCES properties(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.cloudinary_id: text NOT NULL — public_id from Cloudinary
columns.url: text NOT NULL — full delivery URL

property_media.rls: SELECT: public. INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE: authenticated admin only.

enquiry_log.description: Lightweight log — records every WhatsApp button click with property context. No PII collected from visitor.

columns.property_id: uuid REFERENCES properties(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
columns.currency_shown: text — which currency the visitor was viewing

sql_setup: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;
ALTER TABLE properties ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE property_media ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE enquiry_log ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
-- Public read on properties and media
CREATE POLICY 'public_read_properties' ON properties FOR SELECT USING (true);
CREATE POLICY 'public_read_media' ON property_media FOR SELECT USING (true);
-- Admin write (replace with your Supabase user UID)
CREATE POLICY 'public_insert_enquiry' ON enquiry_log FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (true);
CREATE POLICY 'admin_read_enquiry' ON enquiry_log FOR SELECT USING (auth.role() = 'authenticated');

ListingPage.description: Main browse screen. Default view for all visitors.
ListingPage.data: Fetch all properties from Supabase ordered by created_at DESC. Filter client-side by type.
ListingPage.pwa_cache: Cache property list for offline reading via service worker.

PropertyDetailPage.description: Full property detail. Shareable URL. Pre-fills WhatsApp on CTA tap.
PropertyDetailPage.data: Fetch single property by slug. Fetch related property_media ordered by display_order.
PropertyDetailPage.on_wa_click: Log click to enquiry_log table before opening wa.me deeplink.

AboutPage.description: Trust page. Who you are, your mission, direct contact.
AboutPage.data: Static content — no database fetch required.

AdminLoginPage.description: Simple email+password login. Single admin user only.
AdminLoginPage.notes: Protect with Supabase session. No public signup — admin account created manually in Supabase dashboard.

AdminDashboardPage.description: Overview: total listings, enquiry count by property, quick status changes.
AdminDashboardPage.data: Fetch all properties. Fetch enquiry_log counts grouped by property_id.

AdminUploadPage.description: Create a new property listing with media upload.

cloudinary_upload.method: Unsigned upload via Cloudinary Upload Widget or fetch to /upload endpoint

AdminEditPage.description: Edit an existing listing. Reorder media, change status, update price.

PropertyCard.layout: Full-width card. 16:9 image ratio. Status + type badges overlaid on image. Save heart button bottom-right of image. Location (small caps + pin icon) → Title (Cormorant) → Price + Specs row.

EnquireButton.behavior: 1. Log click to enquiry_log (fire and forget). 2. Open wa.me deeplink with pre-filled message.

WhatsAppFAB.position: Fixed, bottom-right above BottomNav. z-index above cards.
WhatsAppFAB.style: Pill shape (border-radius: 28px). WhatsApp green background. Icon + 'Enquire' label.
WhatsAppFAB.message: General enquiry message — no property context.

MediaUploader.preview: Show thumbnail grid during upload. Progress indicator per file.
MediaUploader.on_success: Store cloudinary_id + url in property_media table via Supabase.

CurrencyToggle.placement: Top-right of Header on listing page

whatsapp_integration.general_enquiry_template: Hi, I have an enquiry about your listed properties.
whatsapp_integration.id_short: First 6 characters of property UUID — human-readable reference
whatsapp_integration.currency_in_message: Use whichever currency the visitor currently has selected in the app
whatsapp_integration.logging: Before opening deeplink, POST to enquiry_log table: { property_id, property_title, property_location, enquiry_type, currency_shown }
whatsapp_business_setup: Set up Away Message for after-hours
Use Quick Replies for common questions
Label enquiries by property location for easy tracking

cache_strategy.api_calls_supabase: NetworkFirst with 5s timeout, fallback to cache
cache_strategy.pages: NetworkFirst — always try fresh, show cached on failure

service_worker.offline_behavior: Show cached property listings with an 'offline mode' banner. Property detail pages previously visited are fully available offline.

public: Filter by type (All / For Sale / For Rent)
Property detail page (photos, video, description, specs, features)
WhatsApp enquiry with pre-filled property context
admin: Edit existing listings (price, description, status, media)

v2_post_mvp: Neighborhood info block (schools, hospitals, transport nearby)
Email newsletter signup for new listings
Push notifications for new listings (Web Push API)
explicitly_excluded: Property search by keyword (filter chips are sufficient for MVP)

phase_1.name: Foundation
tasks: Set up Supabase project — run SQL schema
Set up Cloudinary account and upload preset

phase_2.name: Public Listing UI
tasks: Build Header with logo and CurrencyToggle
Build ListingPage — wire to Supabase fetch
Implement localStorage currency preference via Zustand

phase_4.name: Admin Panel
tasks: Set up protected route wrapper (redirect if not authenticated)
Integrate Cloudinary Upload Widget for images
Integrate Cloudinary Upload Widget for video

phase_5.name: PWA & Polish
tasks: Configure Workbox service worker caching strategies
Responsive audit — test on iPhone SE, iPhone 14, Android mid-range
Performance audit — images lazy loaded, fonts preloaded
Supabase query optimisation (indexes on status, type, slug)
Deploy to Vercel with environment variables

slug_generation.uniqueness: Append short UUID suffix if slug already exists: e.g. 3-bedroom-duplex-lekki-a1b2c3

cloudinary_transforms.usage_note: Always use Cloudinary transformation URLs in src attributes — never store raw uploaded URLs directly.

supabase_queries.fetch_all_listings: SELECT p.*, (SELECT array_agg(m.url ORDER BY m.display_order) FROM property_media m WHERE m.property_id = p.id AND m.media_type = 'image') AS image_urls FROM properties p WHERE p.status != 'sold' ORDER BY p.is_featured DESC, p.created_at DESC
supabase_queries.fetch_by_slug: SELECT p.* FROM properties p WHERE p.slug = $1 LIMIT 1
supabase_queries.fetch_media_by_property: SELECT * FROM property_media WHERE property_id = $1 ORDER BY display_order ASC
supabase_queries.log_enquiry: INSERT INTO enquiry_log (property_id, property_title, property_location, enquiry_type, currency_shown) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
supabase_queries.admin_enquiry_counts: SELECT property_id, property_title, count(*) as total FROM enquiry_log GROUP BY property_id, property_title ORDER BY total DESC

security.admin_auth: Supabase email + password. Single pre-created account — no signup flow exposed.
security.rls: All write operations protected by Supabase RLS. Anon key only allows SELECT on properties and property_media.
security.admin_route_guard: React Router protected route checks Supabase session. Redirects to /admin/login if not authenticated.
security.cloudinary_upload: Use unsigned upload preset scoped to a specific folder. Rotate if exposed.
security.no_buyer_data: No personal data collected from visitors. enquiry_log stores only click events with no PII.

performance_targets.offline: Listing page fully functional with cached data
performance_targets.image_strategy: Cloudinary auto-format + quality. Lazy load below the fold. Eager load cover image.
performance_targets.font_strategy: Preconnect to fonts.googleapis.com. display=swap on all fonts.

open_questions: App name confirmed as 'Abode'? Or rename before slug generation begins.
Will prices be stored as raw numbers or display strings? Recommend raw numbers for future filtering.
Single WhatsApp number or multiple (e.g. one for Lagos listings, one for Accra)?
Do you want a 'Share' button (navigator.share API) on property detail pages?
Map embed: show exact pin or area-level only for privacy/security?
